ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock record */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the data (e.g., Daily) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the stock data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded on that day */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest for the stock */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "adjustment_factor" REAL /* Adjustment factor for stock splits and dividends */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the prices are quoted */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry category of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector category of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Primary stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "filters" TEXT /* Filters applied to generate the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "price_target" REAL /* Target price for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alert checks (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, file, database) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key if required */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Last date and time the data source was synchronized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_import_logs" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import log */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source from which data was imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the import occurred */,
  "record_count" INTEGER /* Number of records imported */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the import */,
  "import_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the import process in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_import_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_import_logs_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
